Disable Next.js fetch cache on Supabase client

Next.js 14 caches fetch\(\) results by default, including calls made
by the Supabase client library. This caused stale user data to persist
across deployments. Configure the Supabase admin client to always use
cache: 'no-store' so queries hit the database directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && npx vercel --prod --force 2>&1)
